creator: dpchrist@holgerdanske.com
text:
I had a bad USB image:

        2016-09-25 14:03:57 root@cd2533 /mnt/i3000d/data/dpchrist/iso/freebsd/10.3
        # dd if=/dev/sdc count=1350917 | sha256sum -b
        bd159b85486322febe992226bbec9c86d96d70dd1e5a8b7c6f0bb9d29eb50df3 *-
        1350917+0 records in
        1350917+0 records out
        691669504 bytes (692 MB) copied, 43.0897 s, 16.1 MB/s

        2016-09-25 14:05:01 root@cd2533 /mnt/i3000d/data/dpchrist/iso/freebsd/10.3
        # grep bd159b85486322febe992226bbec9c86d96d70dd1e5a8b7c6f0bb9d29eb50df3 CHECKSUM.SHA256-FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-i386 

I have burned and verified the image to the USB flash drive and will try again.
